hero.badge: Local Partner for UN Sustainable Development Goals
hero.headline: Global Goals,
hero.subheadline: Diyala River Foundation for Sustainable Development — an independent organization implementing the UN Sustainable Development Goals in Diyala Governorate, Iraq, through innovation, community empowerment, and strategic partnerships.

impact.title: Our Impact in Numbers
impact.subtitle: Real achievements on the ground across Diyala Governorate

sdgsGrid.sectionSubtitle: We operate within the UN SDG framework to drive systemic, measurable, and lasting change

sdg4.title: Quality Education
sdg4.description: Digital literacy programs, vocational training, and expanding learning opportunities for all demographics

sdg7.title: Affordable & Clean Energy
sdg7.description: Expanding access to renewable energy sources in underserved and rural communities

sdg8.title: Decent Work & Economic Growth
sdg8.description: Youth employment support, micro-enterprise development, and women's economic empowerment

sdg11.title: Sustainable Cities & Communities
sdg11.description: Building local governance capacity and enhancing resilience of urban and rural communities

sdg13.title: Climate Action
sdg13.description: Advocacy for climate adaptation and implementation of environmental sustainability initiatives

sdg17.title: Partnerships for the Goals
sdg17.description: Building strategic alliances with international organizations, civil society, and private sector

latestProjects.title: Latest Projects & Initiatives
latestProjects.subtitle: Integrated programs delivering measurable progress on the UN SDGs

latestNews.title: Latest News
latestNews.subtitle: Stay updated with the Foundation's latest news and events

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: We translate the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals from global concepts into tangible local programs across Diyala Governorate. Operating across education, energy, employment, and climate action sectors, we build communities capable of lasting resilience and prosperity.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: A Diyala Governorate that stands as a model for locally-driven sustainable development — where international standards are implemented by local hands.

cta.title: Be a Partner in Change
cta.subtitle: Join us in building a sustainable Diyala and achieving all 17 UN Goals on the ground.
